## Title: Fix type confusion in NR MAC CellGroup configuration processing

### Summary
Correct a type confusion bug in `process_CellGroup()` where `CellGroup->mac_CellGroupConfig` was incorrectly declared using typedef `NR_MAC_CellGroupConfig_t*` instead of the actual struct type `struct NR_MAC_CellGroupConfig*`. This mismatch caused undefined behavior when accessing MAC CellGroup configuration fields, potentially leading to memory corruption or crashes. The fix ensures proper type safety and co
